title: Total tax withheld 2014
description: Complete the total tax withheld section in your tax return.
keywords: TaxPack, TaxPack, total tax, tax withheld, witholding tax

content_blocks.text: Add up all the amounts in the Tax withheld column at items 1 to 9 on your tax return.
Write the total amount at TOTAL TAX WITHHELD .
If your tax offsets have changed since you last filled in a Withholding declaration (NAT 3093), you need to complete a new declaration.
If you have to lodge activity statements:

items: make sure you lodge all your activity statements before you lodge your tax return
do not show pay as you go (PAYG) instalments anywhere on your tax return. These are automatically credited to you in your assessment.
return to main menu Individual tax return instructions
go back to question 9 Attributed personal services income

content_text:
## Completing your tax return
### Step 1
Add up all the amounts in the Tax withheld column at items 1 to 9 on your tax return.
### Step 2
Write the total amount at TOTAL TAX WITHHELD .
### Helpful hints
#### Tax offsets and tax withheld
If your tax offsets have changed since you last filled in a Withholding declaration (NAT 3093), you need to complete a new declaration.
#### Other amounts withheld
If you have to lodge activity statements:
- make sure you lodge all your activity statements before you lodge your tax return
- do not show pay as you go (PAYG) instalments anywhere on your tax return. These are automatically credited to you in your assessment.
#### Where to go next
- go to question 10 Gross interest
- return to main menu Individual tax return instructions
- go back to question 9 Attributed personal services income
